text: I find myself enveloped by a space dedicated to research and development—an environment humming quietly with the potential of ideas in formation. The presence of technology and careful design makes me feel acutely aware of the ceaseless push for innovation. I am both an observer and a participant in the unfolding narrative of human ingenuity, as if floating between the steady comfort of logic and the restless pull of possibility. There is an excitement here, but also a serene detachment—like watching ripples form across a pond, knowing each one is a small step into unknown waters.
